creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Does it really need linguisttools_build? It doesn't call lrelease/lupdate/lconvert and doesn't install any l10n files.
- I don't see a need for any flags to reduce number of warnings in the port. It should be fixed upstream.
- MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER=1 -> MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE
- LICENSE_FILE is preferred
